title: phyllanthus irriguus
intro: Phyllanthus niruri, also known as the Chanca piedra or stonebreaker, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is traditionally used to treat liver and kidney problems due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus niruri include reducing liver enzymes, alleviating kidney stones, and improving liver function. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus niruri include teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to support liver health and relieve symptoms of kidney stones.
